prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Connectors & fasteners, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: wrong hanger for joist size. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: Simpson catalogs, IRC.
title: Tool and material selection: Connectors & fasteners (commercial project)
